name: Dixie Narco 501E
description:
Interested in a quote? Call us 413.282.3776 or email Info@vitalvendingsales.com!

Dixie Narco 501E Beverage Vending Machine
The Workhorse Of The Vending World.

When it comes to dependability, the Dixie Narco 501E stands in a class of its own. Trusted by operators for decades, this machine has earned its reputation as one of the most reliable vending machines ever built. From high-traffic office buildings to warehouses and schools, the 501E delivers consistent performance day after day, year after year.

Built To Last

Designed for durability and easy maintenance, the 501E’s proven refrigeration system and sturdy construction have made it a favorite in the vending industry. It’s simple to service, parts are widely available, and it keeps working long after others have called it quits — a true definition of plug-and-play reliability.

Versatile And Operator-Friendly

With a 72-inch height, 37-inch width, and 33-inch depth, the 501E offers an ideal footprint for nearly any location. It’s capable of vending a wide variety of bottles and cans, from 12 oz sodas to energy drinks and waters, using a proven electronic control board that’s intuitive for operators and effortless for customers.

Features You’ll Appreciate

Legendary reliability and simple design

Proven refrigeration deck for long-term performance

Adjustable product selections for cans or bottles

LED lighting upgrade options available

Easy programming and pricing adjustments

Optional credit card reader for cashless convenience

Why Choose The 501E

The Dixie Narco 501E isn’t flashy — it’s dependable. It’s the machine that keeps selling when others stop. If you’re looking for a vending unit that’s low-maintenance, field-tested, and still one of the most serviceable beverage machines ever made, this is it.

Ready to add a true workhorse to your lineup?
Request a quote today and bring the timeless reliability of the Dixie Narco 501E to your route.

name: Evoke Elevator Food & Beverage Vending Machine
description:
Interested in a quote? Call us 413.282.3776 or email Info@vitalvendingsales.com !

The Evoke Elevator merchandiser brings together the latest in vending technology, enhanced merchandising and attractive styling. With up to 60 selections (standard configuration is up to 50 selections with five trays of ten selections per tray), along with a soft elevator delivery, the Evoke Elevator offers maximum product versatility. The soft elevator delivery allows you to vend fragile items such as sandwiches, salads, fresh fruit cups, and carbonated beverages from all trays and ensures optimal product rotation through First-In First-Out (FIFO) loading.

Specifications

Evoke Elevator Selections Up to 60 items

Capacity Varies with tray configuration

Payment Systems All Industry standard MDB compatible devices

Data Communication DEX/UCS

Electrical Requirements Domestic: 115 VAC/60Hz, 5.5 AMPS; International: 230 VAC/50Hz, 4.8 AMPS; With Heated Glass: 115 VAC/60Hz, 6.5 AMPS; International: 230 VAC/50Hz, 4.5 AMPS

Refrigeration Super 1/3 HP, R134a or R-513a Closed System

Height 72” (183 cm)

Width 41” (104 cm)

Depth 38” (97 cm)

Ship Weight*831 lbs. (376.9 kg) *Varies with tray configuration and options.

name: USI Evoke 6 Snack Vending Machine
description:
Interested in a quote? Call us 413.282.3776 or email Info@vitalvendingsales.com !

Featuring the largest merchandising window, most capacity and selections, and the latest in customer interfaces and payment system technology, the Evoke Snack 6 provides operators with the capability to generate more revenue from existing locations and secure new profitable locations.

Ideal for high traffic, high volume locations, the Evoke Snack 6 enables operators to improve operational efficiency, improve bottom-line performance, and support business expansion. With its expansive capacity of up to 733 items and 83 product selections, the Evoke Snack 6 provides the largest merchandising capability on the market with:

Six (6) standard Flex Shelf Technology Steel trays and 7th full-size tray option

12-wide configurations for a maximum variety and product selection

Over 47” of vertical product space and adjustability for large size snacks

The Evoke Snack 6’s modern design attracts and engages consumers with custom graphics and 10.1” iCart touchscreen (optional) featuring:

Shopping cart and single selections modes

Calorie display before purchase

Product browse mode

Advertising options for static and video content

name: AI Smart Freezer Cooler FLEX
description:
Interested in a quote? Call us 413.282.3776 or email Info@vitalvendingsales.com!

HAHA US550FT Smart Freezer / Cooler
One Machine. Two Modes. Smarter Than Ever.

Bring next-level flexibility to your vending lineup with the HAHA US550FT Smart Freezer / Cooler — the only smart vending system that can function as a deep freezer or a refrigerated cooler, depending on your needs. With a quick backend setting adjustment, operators can switch between modes, turning one machine into a year-round revenue generator for any product mix.

Future-Ready Smart Vending

The HAHA US550FT combines powerful AI and cloud connectivity with temperature-controlled performance. It’s engineered for frozen meals, ice cream, energy drinks, or grab-and-go snacks — whatever your location demands. Just toggle your settings, restock, and start selling.

Key Features & Benefits

Convertible Temperature Control – Run as a true freezer (down to –20 °C / –4 °F) or as a standard cooler (around 4 °C / 39 °F) — the choice is yours.

AI-Powered Recognition – Smart sensors identify products, track inventory in real-time, and reduce shrink through intelligent item detection.

Cashless, Contactless Payments – Accept all major credit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and other mobile wallets for friction-free transactions.

Remote Monitoring Dashboard – Manage pricing, product mix, temperature, and alerts from anywhere using HAHA’s cloud platform.

Compact, High-Visibility Design – Bright LED lighting, modern branding, and a glass-front door make products stand out in any setting.

Energy-Efficient Operation – Optimized compressor and insulation system reduces energy costs while keeping temperatures stable.

Plug-and-Play Deployment – Ships fully configured and ready to operate on arrival; just plug in and connect to Wi-Fi or cellular.

Ideal For

Office & Workplace Micromarkets: Frozen meals during winter, drinks in summer — switch modes as needed.

Gyms & Recreation Centers: Keep smoothies and recovery drinks cold — or stock frozen protein bars and ice cream.

Universities & Dorms: Year-round vending flexibility for high-traffic student areas.

Hospitality & Multi-Unit Housing: Offer 24/7 self-serve convenience with minimal maintenance.

Specifications

Model: HAHA US550FT

Capacity: Up to 550 L / 19.4 cu ft

Operation Modes: Freezer or Cooler (single-zone selectable)

Temperature Range: –20 °C to +10 °C (–4 °F to 50 °F)

Connectivity: 4G LTE / Wi-Fi

Payment Options: Credit / Debit / Mobile Wallets

Smart Platform: HAHA Cloud AI Dashboard

name: AI Mini Smart Cooler
description:
Interested in a quote? Call us 413.282.3776 or email Info@vitalvendingsales.com!

AI MINI 

High-Quality, Economical Smart Vending for Modern Retail

The HAHA Smart Cooler is a next-generation solution for unattended retail. It combines sleek design with advanced AI technology to create a seamless shopping experience for customers, while giving operators powerful tools to manage their business from anywhere.

Why Choose HAHA Smart Coolers?

High Quality and Affordable
HAHA Smart Coolers deliver reliable, durable performance at a lower cost. They are one of the most economical options in the smart cooler market, with lower equipment prices and more affordable ongoing fees compared to competing solutions.

Boosts Sales
On average, customers spend $4.55 per transaction using a HAHA Smart Cooler — nearly double the typical spend of a traditional snack, drink, or combo vending machine.

Versatile Product Range
HAHA Smart Coolers are not limited to snacks, drinks, or fresh food. They work for almost any item larger than a tennis ball, including apparel, over-the-counter medications, toiletries, electronics, and personal care products.

AI-Powered Convenience
Customers unlock the cooler with a card or mobile payment, select their items, and the system automatically charges them. No manual checkout is required.

Flexible Payment Options
Supports all major cashless payment methods, including credit cards, mobile wallets, and QR codes.

Real-Time Management
Operators can track inventory levels, sales data, and machine status through a cloud-based dashboard.

Secure and Efficient
The smart locking system ensures products are only accessible after a successful payment, helping reduce shrinkage and loss.

Modern, Compact Design
The clean, space-efficient design fits well in offices, gyms, hotels, apartment buildings, retail stores, airports, and other locations where unattended retail makes sense.

Ideal For:

Workplaces, residential buildings, fitness centers, hotels, schools, airports, and any location that benefits from 24/7 retail access.
